creator: stargrave@stargrave.org
text:
Greetings, Yuri!

You are right that I forget that all files in newsyslog.d are sourced. Thanks for the correction!

I have checked your patch and have not found any problems.

Suddenly I saw a typo in pkg-message.in: it mentions "nncp-newcfg" command, that was renamed long time ago to "nncp-cfgnew". Could you also fix it too?
